title: Substance Use Disorder Drop In Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Substance Use Disorder Drop In Programs 10 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 4TH DIMENSION RECOVERY CENTER CLACKAMAS CENTER ADDICTION RECOVERY PEER MENTORING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers peer mentoring services for substance use disorders. Mentors help clients to find housing, employment, applying for benefits such as TANF and OHP, guidance about legal aid programs, and transportation to recovery-oriented meetings and events. Also offers 12-step meetings and recovery-related activities and events, including dances, barbecues, poetry nights, and movie nights. 11690 SE 82nd Avenue Happy Valley, OR 97086 Eligibility: Individuals age 14-35 with substance use issues. Clients can be currently in treatment, just leaving treatment, or at any other stage of their recovery process. Hours: 7 days per week 2pm-10pm Email (971) 703-4623 Get Directions Visit Website More Details 4TH DIMENSION RECOVERY CENTER O'ROURKE CENTER ADDICTION RECOVERY PEER MENTORING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers peer mentoring services for substance use disorders. Mentors help clients to find housing, employment, applying for benefits such as TANF and OHP, guidance about legal aid programs, and transportation to recovery-oriented meetings and events. Also offers 12-step meetings and recovery-related activities and events, including dances, barbecues, poetry nights, and movie nights. 362 SW Oak Street Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Individuals age 14-35 with substance use issues. Clients can be currently in treatment, just leaving treatment, or at any other stage of their recovery process. Hours: 7 days per week 2pm-10pm Email (971) 703-4623 Get Directions Visit Website More Details 4TH DIMENSION RECOVERY CENTER SMIT CENTER ADDICTION RECOVERY PEER MENTORING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers peer mentoring services for substance use disorders. Mentors help clients to find housing, employment, applying for benefits such as TANF and OHP, guidance about legal aid programs, and transportation to recovery-oriented meetings and events. Also offers 12-step meetings and recovery-related activities and events, including dances, barbecues, poetry nights, and movie nights. 324 NE 9th Street Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Individuals age 14-35 with substance use issues. Clients can be currently in treatment, just leaving treatment, or at any other stage of their recovery process. Hours: 7 days per week 2pm-10pm Email (971) 703-4623 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADDICTIONS RECOVERY CENTER FRESH START WITHDRAWAL MANAGEMENT DETOXIFICATION AND SOBERING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides patients with a physically and emotionally stable environment to complete the detox process and prepare for transition into treatment. 1021 E Main Street Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 776-7086 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BRIDGES TO CHANGE CLUB HOPE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a recovery drop-in center with support services for substance addiction, including support groups and an employment center. Additional services include laundry facilities, showers, and snacks. Services are available for individuals at any stage of recovery. 100 SE Cleveland Avenue Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Drop-In Center: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Showers and laundry: Monday-Friday 10am-3pm (503) 933-2440 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PROVOKING HOPE RECOVERY SUPPORT SERVICES ADDICTION RECOVERY SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer, one-on-one, and group support on topics such as recovery, relationships, stress, co-dependency, parenting, and grief. Also provides specialized information and referrals. 213 NE 10th Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (971) 228-2020 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RECOVERY OUTREACH COMMUNITY CENTER SALEM DROP-IN CENTER AND CONFERENCE ROOM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in center for individuals experiencing mental health or addiction challenges. Offers a safe space to talk about trauma, anxiety, emotions, and other personal topics while supporting recovery. Daily activities include yoga, art, walking, games, internet access, and socializing. Monthly group outings are also available. 1190 Broadway Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Saturday/Sunday 11am-4pm Tuesday 12pm-5pm Email (503) 393-4273 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RECOVERY OUTREACH COMMUNITY CENTER SOCC DROP-IN CENTER AND CONFERENCE ROOM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in center for individuals experiencing mental health or addiction challenges. Offers a safe space to talk about trauma, anxiety, emotions, and other personal topics while supporting recovery. Daily activities include yoga, art, walking, games, internet access, and socializing. Monthly group outings are also available. 280 NE Santiam Boulevard Mill City, OR 97360 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 12am-5pm Email (503) 392-4276 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RESTORED CONNECTIONS PEER CENTER RECOVERY COMMUNITY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a place for individuals who are in recovery to hang out, drink coffee, and seek alternatives to ingrained substance abuse habits by developing new hobbies. 146 E 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as having a substance use abuse history and are in recovery Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (458) 544-0000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WASHINGTON COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH HILLSBORO RECOVERY CENTER HAWTHORN WALK-IN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides urgent care services for mental health and addiction concerns. Services include assessment for mental health and/or addiction concerns, crisis counseling, information and referral, education on mental health and addiction, peer support, and connection to treatment providers. Concerned loved ones may also receive support and information about available community services. 5250 NE Elam Young Parkway Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-7pm, Saturday/Sunday 10am-4pm (503) 846-2288 Get Directions Visit Website More Details 4TH DIMENSION RECOVERY CENTER ADDICTION RECOVERY PEER MENTORING SERVICES 4TH DIMENSION RECOVERY CENTER ADDICTION RECOVERY PEER MENTORING SERVICES 4TH DIMENSION RECOVERY CENTER ADDICTION RECOVERY PEER MENTORING SERVICES ADDICTIONS RECOVERY CENTER DETOXIFICATION AND SOBERING SERVICES BRIDGES TO CHANGE CLUB HOPE PROVOKING HOPE RECOVERY SUPPORT SERVICES ADDICTION RECOVERY SUPPORT SERVICES RECOVERY OUTREACH COMMUNITY CENTER DROP-IN CENTER AND CONFERENCE ROOM RECOVERY OUTREACH COMMUNITY CENTER DROP-IN CENTER AND CONFERENCE ROOM RESTORED CONNECTIONS PEER CENTER RECOVERY COMMUNITY CENTER WASHINGTON COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH HAWTHORN WALK-IN CENTER
